creator: valerio.daelli@gmail.com
text:
Haproxy is a tool already in the ports tree. We built this update to the ports
        because we need some new features and we feel that the jump from haproxy 1.2
        and haproxy 1.3 is too big to happen in the same ports.
        Since it is so critical to some web farm we do not want to break nothing
        in this port.
